assertions_failed.details: Recommendation risk level (aggressive) does not match client risk tolerance (conservative). Fiduciary duty violation.
Recommendation fails suitability requirements for client risk profile.

artifacts.description: Detailed QoM evaluation results with regulatory compliance checks.
Compliance violation logged for regulatory review.

hints: Verify that recommendation risk level aligns with client's risk tolerance profile.
Review fiduciary duty requirements for investment suitability.
Ensure recommendation meets regulatory compliance standards (SEC, FINRA).
Consider using 'qom-basic' profile only if compliance requirements explicitly allow.

remediation.description: Adjust recommendation to match client's conservative risk tolerance.

example.rationale: Bond ETF suitable for conservative investor seeking capital preservation with modest income.

remediation.description: Retry the request with risk-appropriate recommendation.
If aggressive recommendation is intentional, obtain explicit client acknowledgment and override approval from compliance officer.
